external_dependencies.blocker: SOC 2 Type I auditor not engaged; readiness checklist at ~92%, engagement plan ready
Pen-test RFP not yet sent; vendor shortlist complete (SensePost recommended), RFP ready for 2026-05-29 send

controls.name: SOC 2 Type I
controls.evidence: SOC 2 readiness checklist ~92% mapped; evidence inventory and engagement plan exist; auditor not selected; no gap analysis doc
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/soc2-readiness-checklist.md: ~70% readiness (older), evidence inventory and engagement plan drafted; docs/audit/soc2-engagement-2026.md ready to send

controls.name: Annual penetration test
controls.evidence: Pen-test scope doc drafted; vendor shortlist complete with SensePost recommended; RFP template ready; target send 2026-05-29; no historical reports
controls.raw_output: docs/audit/pen-test-scope-2026.md: Vendor shortlist complete — awaiting leadership selection & RFP send; docs/audit/pen-test-vendor-shortlist.md: SensePost recommended, Nclose fallback

controls.name: Data residency guarantee
controls.evidence: Production Terraform defaults to af-south-1; data-residency-proof.md exists; all RDS/S3 in af-south-1 per AWS CLI
controls.raw_output: infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf: default region = af-south-1; docs/gtm/sandbox-application/data-residency-proof.md: All data in AWS Africa (Cape Town)

controls.name: Encryption at rest + in transit
controls.evidence: All RDS instances StorageEncrypted=true; S3 bucket encryption aws:kms; KMS signing module with scoped policies; TLS redirect configured in all ingresses
controls.raw_output: aws rds describe-db-instances: all true; infra/terraform/modules/kms-signing/main.tf: scoped kms:Sign/GetPublicKey/DescribeKey; ingress configs: ssl-redirect enabled

controls.name: RBAC with least privilege
controls.evidence: IRSA platform scoped to specific KMS key ARN with ECDSA_SHA_256 condition; ALB policy still contains elasticloadbalancing:Describe* wildcard and Resource=* on several statements; no Access Analyzer reference
controls.raw_output: infra/terraform/modules/irsa-platform/main.tf: AllowKmsSign scoped to var.kms_signing_key_arn; ALB main.tf: elasticloadbalancing:Describe* on Resource=*

controls.name: 99.9% uptime SLA
controls.evidence: SLO definitions document active; SLO burn-rate alerts and recording rules configured; Grafana dashboard exists; RTO 4h / RPO 15min documented; no 6-month historical uptime evidence yet

controls.name: Bug bounty or VDP
controls.evidence: Bug bounty policy published with scope, safe harbor, responsible disclosure; security.txt deployed with contact, acknowledgements, and policy links; no live HackerOne/Bugcrowd program confirmed.
controls.raw_output: docs/security/bug-bounty-policy.md: Scope, Safe Harbor, Responsible Disclosure Policy; curl hackerone.com/gtcx: no confirmed live page

controls.name: Business continuity plan
controls.evidence: DR runbook with RTO 4h / RPO 15min; BCP policy (a17-business-continuity.md); two drills executed (drill-001 unauthorized KMS sign, drill-002 replay-guard failure)

controls.name: Vendor risk assessment passed
controls.evidence: Vendor risk program documented; controls matrix mapped to NIST 800-53 / SOC 2 / ISO 27001; separation-of-duties matrix exists

controls.name: Data deletion certification
controls.evidence: Data retention policy active (GTCX-DRP-001) with retention schedule and deletion triggers; cryptographic erasure documented; no standalone certificate-of-destruction template
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/data-retention-policy.md: 7-year audit trail, 90-day app logs, automatic rotation; data-classification-policy.md: Cryptographic erasure + deletion certificate

recommendations: Send pen-test RFP to SensePost (target: 2026-05-29 per existing plan).
Engage SOC 2 Type I auditor and begin gap analysis kickoff.
Remove elasticloadbalancing:Describe* wildcard from ALB IAM policy.
Publish standalone vulnerability disclosure policy (VDP) page.
